calendar.matters:
Plaintiff'S Motion For Order Deeming Original Renewal Of Judgment Filed Timely Or Allow Filing Of Corrected Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DANIEL B. BURBOTT, Esq. of Moore Brewer Wolfe Jones Tyler & North (Tel: 858-626-2880) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF REDWOOD CREDIT UNION's Motion For Order Deeming Original Renewal Of Judgment Filed Timely Or Allow Filing Of Corrected Renewal Of Judgment.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for order deeming original renewal of judgment filed" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: K. Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Viscio #12353.

John Mendonza, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Redwood Credit Union.
Plaintiff Witness John McLaughlin, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Jay Stone.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Principal - $28,059.44
Prejudgment Interest - $6,209.35
Attorney's fees - $1,436.50
Costs - $1,2595.40 for a total judgment in the amount of $37,000.69
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2012 Continued To Sep-04-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 9/04/2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
